message:
chore(browser): remove verbose logging and dead code from SQL/IVF modules

- Remove console.log/warn from statistics-manager, query-planner, planner-single
- Remove logSingleTablePlan and _logPlan debug methods
- Remove unused static wrapper methods in ivf-index.js
- Remove redundant JSDoc comments across IVF modules
- Clean up executor-subquery error handling

-557 lines net reduction
